claim_scope: H/M development-only low-freedom feature rebuild candidates for paired-clean null-tail diagnosis; not training evidence, product accuracy, hardware validation, shadow/final validation, full ten-material matrix, or manuscript-grade powder XRD

candidate_views.description: Compress individual peak columns into signed H/M family means and low-freedom aggregate contrasts while retaining physical peak-family information.
Use only unique-window, all-window, and ratio/balance features as the lowest-freedom sanity view.
Diagnostic view that removes individual hematite peak features but keeps magnetite peaks and aggregate windows.
Conservative view that removes all individual peak features and keeps only family/window/ratio aggregates.

stop_rules: If no candidate passes paired-clean null and admission, do not train.
If a reduced candidate passes null gates but later destroys real H/M signal, do not upgrade it.
Do not lower null thresholds to pass a candidate.
Do not treat leave-out diagnostic views as final evidence without a preregistered physical interpretation.
